data.title: SHAKEEL HAIDER
data.description: I'm a passionate software engineer with over 5 years of experience in 🔴 frontend, 🟢 backend, and 🔵 database development. Skilled in creating user-friendly interfaces, scalable applications, and efficient data solutions, I thrive on solving complex problems and delivering high-quality software.
